commit.message:
8213198: G1: Periodic GC should trigger concurrent mark for StringTable cleanup

Implement ergonomic periodic concurrent marking for StringTable cleanup.
When G1PeriodicGCInterval is not explicitly set on the command line,
use G1PeriodicGCErgonomicInterval to trigger concurrent marks at a
configurable interval, enabling StringTable cleanup without user
configuration.

Changes:
- Add G1PeriodicGCErgonomicInterval experimental flag (g1_globals.hpp)
- Use FLAG_IS_DEFAULT() to distinguish cmdline vs runtime settings
- Add behavior table documentation covering all 6 configuration cases
- Add helper predicates for cleaner decision logic
- Add JTReg tests: TestPeriodicGCBehaviorTable, TestPeriodicGCStringTableCleanup
